title: KILL BLUE Reveals Creditless Ending Video Featuring ED by RIIZE
content: KILL BLUE anime has released its creditless ending animation video, featuring the ED song “KILL SHOT” by RIIZE. Studio CUE is in charge of the animation production, with Hiro Kaburagi ( Kimi ni Todoke , GREAT PRETENDER ) as the director.
author: Anime Corner

title: 10 Anime Coming to Netflix in May 2026
content: Netflix is all set for its May calendar and has quite an exciting list of anime coming to the platform for the first time. While there are only two new anime series being added to the platform this month, Netflix confirmed the return of some of the biggest anime ever.
author: ComicBook

title: Jujutsu Kaisen Unveils New Look At Beloved Characters Ahead of a Major Project
content: The exciting Season 3 of Jujutsu Kaisen reached its conclusion last month with a major cliffhanger. While the fourth season might take a while to be released, manga fans are already aware that the story will keep getting more exciting after Yuta grabbed all the attention in Sendai Colony .
author: ComicBook

title: Crunchyroll’s Best Action Fantasy of The Year Reveals New Update
content: The exciting Spring 2026 anime lineup marks the return of Wistoria: Wand and Sword after almost two years since the first season’s debut. The anime, based on a novel by Fujino Omori, debuted in 2024 and became a surprising hit in 2024, praised for its animation, worldbuilding, and characters.
author: ComicBook

title: Eldo Yoshimizu's Ryuko Manga Gets New Arc After 16 Years
content: The official X (formerly Twitter ) account for LEED Publishing 's Torch web manga platform announced on Saturday that Eldo Yoshimizu 's Ryuko manga will get a new arc on the platform beginning on April 27. The new arc marks the first continuation for the series in 16 years.
author: ANN

title: A Sound Master Goes After Gero's New Client in MARRIAGETOXIN Reveals Episode 4 Preview
content: MARRIAGETOXIN anime revealed the Episode 4 preview images and synopsis, ahead of the episode’s April 28 release. Studio BONES Film is handling the animation production, which premiered on April 3 . Crunchyroll is streaming the anime.
author: Anime Corner

title: Shiwasu Hoshikawa, Yūichirō Momose Launch New Manga Together
content: The June issue of Kodansha 's Afternoon magazine announced on Saturday that Shiwasu Hoshikawa and Hypnosis Mic writer Yūichirō Momose will launch a new manga together titled Gyakusatsu Kigen (Genocide Origin) in the next issue on May 25.
author: ANN

title: 3 Arcs One Piece Needs After Elbaph To Conclude The Story
content: Warning: This article contains spoilers from the One Piece manga! One Piece has long entered its Final Saga, but it’s nowhere near its ending yet. The current arc takes the Straw Hat Pirates all the way to the Elbaph, an isolated island in the New World where the Giants live.
author: ComicBook

title: Will Shows Off His New Power in Wistoria: Wand and Sword Season 2 Episode 4 Preview
content: Wistoria: Wand and Sword Season 2 has revealed the preview images and synopsis for Episode 4 (Episode 16 overall). Crunchyroll is streaming the anime worldwide, with Episode 4 scheduled to premiere on May 3.
author: Anime Corner

title: 11 Years Later, A Major Shonen Jump Series Is Going to End
content: It seems like Shonen Jump is set to lose another major series its last as a new report claims that Black Clover is indeed going to be ending after 11 years. Black Clover has been fast approaching its grand finale over the last year, and has even been getting into a series of “ Super Climax” updates for the last few…
author: ComicBook
